summary: Phase 3 complete. All 7 tasks executed: hooks command group shell, init/list/remove subcommands, CLI registration, unit tests (17), integration tests (4). 21 tests all passing.
completedPhases: Phase 2: Hook scripts and profiles (8 tasks)
learnings: TypeScript does not narrow index-access types after if-guard; non-null assertion needed
Plan code was highly accurate -- only 1 minor TS fix needed across 7 tasks
decisions: Core logic (initHooks, listHooks, removeHooks) extracted as exported functions for testability
mergeSettings replaces the entire hooks key (harness owns it, user owns everything else)
remove deletes settings.json entirely if hooks was the only key
resolveHookSourceDir() uses __dirname-relative path to find hook .js scripts
